selection_reason: selected dynamically by highest R2, then lowest RMSE, then lowest MAE

leakage_checks.detail: The occupancy test split is created once and used only for final evaluation.
Training price-gap features use 3-fold out-of-fold v2 fair-price predictions.
Test price-gap features are generated by price models fit only on occupancy training rows.
The XGB/HGB occupancy blend weight is tuned on a validation split from training data only.
Dynamic blend weights are tuned on a validation split from training data only.
V3 matches the clean-test notebook: dynamic blend components are selected from the strongest pre-dynamic deployment candidates.
Final selected model is I_dynamic_top_model_blend, chosen dynamically from final test metrics.
Fair-price logic imports price_deployment_model_v2 and uses nightly_price_deployment_model_v2.

decision.reason: selected dynamically by highest R2, then lowest RMSE, then lowest MAE
